creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
- Adjust to use 5.12.4. Options Helpers

Here is port test clean, this is problem with RedPorts.

These files are installed here, and when i remove them from pkg-plist have leftovers:

tar: include/allegro5/allegro_native_dialog.h: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/liballegro_dialog.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/liballegro_dialog.so.5.0: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/liballegro_dialog.so.5.0.9: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: libdata/pkgconfig/allegro_dialog-5.0.pc: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: libdata/pkgconfig/allegro_dialog-5.pc: Cannot stat: No such file or directory


make pretty-print-config
+ALSA +DOCS -PULSEAUDIO EXAMPLES_DEMOS[ +EXAMPLES +DEMOS ]
